title: Stone Brick Overlay
description: Whole stone bricks in connected walls.
body:
This unique overlay resource pack utilizes only stone bricks to present beautiful natural looking stone walls with full uncut bricks. Only walls have been changed, floors are still intact.
#  
![Stone wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44b328ef2735cadbf68543aafbef628cd76d0d15.jpeg)
#  
Stone, mossy stone, cracked stone bricks are extended into the following blocks:
- natural stones (andesite, diorite, calcite, granite, tuff, stone, cobblestone) 
- terracotta 
- concrete, concrete powder 
- dirt, mud, clay, sand, gravel
- dead coral 

I have made this pack because the majority of the connected block and overlay resource packes are changing too many things causing unnecessary visual glithes in creative builds.
# 
If you would like to have full bricks on the floor as well, please delete this line: 
```
faces=east west north south
```
in the following file inside the resource pack:
```
/assets/minecraft/optifine/ctm/_overlays/stone_bricks/stone_bricks.properties
```
# 
Please check out my other pack, [Grass Overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/grass-overlay): in a similar fashion it will upgrade only the grass and moss overhangs.

If you have any suggestions please let me know on my discord channel.
# 
Requires Optifine, or Continuity mod. Does not work in vanilla Minecraft.
